mapper.sql: id, product_id, group_price, required_size, duration_hours, stock, status, start_time, end_time, create_time, update_time

a.id, a.product_id, p.name AS product_name, c.name AS category_name, p.price AS product_price, a.group_price, a.required_size, a.duration_hours, a.stock, a.status, a.start_time, a.end_time, a.create_time, a.update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_buy_activity (product_id, group_price, required_size, duration_hours, stock, status, start_time, end_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{productId}, #{groupPrice}, #{requiredSize}, #{durationHours}, #{stock}, #{status}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE group_buy_activity SET product_id = #{productId}, group_price = #{groupPrice}, required_size = #{requiredSize}, duration_hours = #{durationHours}, stock = #{stock}, status = #{status}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM group_buy_activity WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM group_buy_activity WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND status = 1 AND (start_time IS NULL OR start_time <= NOW()) AND (end_time IS NULL OR end_time >= NOW()) ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE group_buy_activity SET stock = stock + #{quantity}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM group_buy_activity ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT FROM group_buy_activity WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY id DESC
